app.name: Rotary Minutes
app.tagline: Modern meeting minutes for Rotary and Rotaract clubs

adminPages.clubs: Create, activate and configure clubs. Manage subscriptions, members and per-club features.
adminPages.users: User accounts, club memberships and district access grants.
adminPages.billing: Revenue, Stripe payments and financial tracking for club subscriptions.
adminPages.subscriptions: Plans, promo codes, add-ons and per-club subscription tracking.
adminPages.roles: Built-in and custom role permissions for clubs.
adminPages.announcements: Broadcast announcements to all clubs or a targeted selection.
adminPages.support: Support tickets submitted by clubs and request tracking.
adminPages.contacts: Messages received via the public contact form.
adminPages.featureFlags: Default modules and progressive rollout feature flags.
adminPages.settings: Platform identity, integrations, analytics and backups.
adminPages.export: Export global platform statistics as JSON or PDF.

WELCOME.title: Welcome to Rotary Minutes
WELCOME.body: This interactive guide walks you through the essential features for running your club day to day.

DASHBOARD.title: Dashboard
DASHBOARD.body: Your home base: next meeting, recent minutes, attendance stats and open actions. Create a meeting or minutes in one click.

MEETINGS.title: Meetings
MEETINGS.body: Schedule statutory meetings and use live mode to draft minutes during the session.

MINUTES.title: Minutes
MINUTES.body: Draft, submit and finalize your minutes. Each document can be exported as an authenticated PDF with QR code.

MEMBERS.title: Members
MEMBERS.body: Manage your member list, contact details and club dues tracking.

TREASURY.title: Treasury
TREASURY.body: Track income and expenses, generate financial reports and keep a clear view of your club's finances.

SETTINGS.title: Settings
SETTINGS.body: Configure club profile, users, roles, subscription and workflow preferences.

COMPLETE.title: You're all set!
COMPLETE.body: You now know the basics of Rotary Minutes. Try live meeting mode at your next statutory session.

meetings.title: No meetings scheduled
meetings.description: Start by scheduling your next statutory meeting. A draft minutes document will be created automatically.

minutes.title: No minutes yet
minutes.description: Create a meeting to generate a draft, or use live mode during a session.

members.title: Add your club members
members.description: Import from Excel or add members one by one to track dues and attendance.

treasury.title: Start club treasury
treasury.description: Record your first income or expense to track your club's finances.

emails.title: Communicate with members
emails.description: Create an email template and send meeting or dues reminders.

dashboard_meetings.title: Schedule your next meeting
dashboard_meetings.description: A planned meeting helps you prepare the agenda and minutes in advance.

dashboard_minutes.title: Draft your first minutes
dashboard_minutes.description: After a meeting, complete the generated draft and finalize it for an authenticated PDF.

live_no_minute.title: No minutes linked to this meeting
live_no_minute.description: Create a meeting with a minutes template or open an existing meeting that includes a draft.

intro.SECRETARY: As secretary, here are the essential tasks for running club administration.
intro.TREASURER: As treasurer, start with members and club finances.
intro.PRESIDENT: As president, follow these steps to lead the club with confidence.
intro.READER: Discover how to view essential club information.

run_live_meeting.title: Use live mode
run_live_meeting.hint: Attendance and notes during the session

finalize_minute.title: Finalize minutes
finalize_minute.hint: Get the PDF with QR code

update_profile.title: Update my profile

minute_editor_intro.title: Writing minutes
minute_editor_intro.body: Complete each agenda item during or after the meeting. Auto-save runs every 30 seconds.

minute_editor_workflow.title: Minutes approval
minute_editor_workflow.body: Submit to the president for review, then finalize to generate the official authenticated PDF.

minute_editor_agenda.title: Agenda items
minute_editor_agenda.body: For each item: note decisions and follow-up actions with an owner and due date.

live_meeting_intro.title: Live meeting mode
live_meeting_intro.body: Use this screen during the session: attendance on the left, minutes on the right. No more Word after the meeting.

live_attendance.title: Attendance sheet
live_attendance.body: Mark members present, absent or excused. Attendance feeds your statistics automatically.

dashboard_missions.title: Getting started checklist
dashboard_missions.body: Follow the missions below to master Rotary Minutes in a few sessions.

minute_finalize_action.title: Finalize minutes
minute_finalize_action.body: Once content is ready, the president can approve and lock the document.
minute_finalize_action.action: Click here to approve and finalize

minute_submit_action.title: Submit for review
minute_submit_action.body: Send the draft to the president before finalization.
minute_submit_action.action: Click here to submit to president

emails_intro.title: Email communication
emails_intro.body: Manage templates, contacts and campaigns from this section.

emails_compose_action.title: Compose a message
emails_compose_action.body: Write an email and choose recipients.

calendar_intro.body: Meetings, deadlines and events in one monthly view.

calendar_export_action.body: Download an ICS file for Google Calendar or Outlook.

events_create_action.title: New event
events_create_action.action: Click here to create an event

settings_intro.title: Club settings
settings_intro.body: Profile, users, workflow and enabled modules.

settings_guide_action.title: Club profile
settings_guide_action.body: Verify meeting location, officers and contact details.

attendance_intro.title: Attendance reports
attendance_intro.body: Track presence rates required by Rotary.

attendance_export_action.title: Export report

profile_intro.title: Member portal
profile_intro.body: View your dues, attendance and finalized minutes.

dues_intro.title: Dues management

week1_meetings.title: Plan meetings ahead

week1_minutes.title: Try live mode
week1_minutes.body: At your next session, draft minutes in real time — save hours every month.

week2_dues.body: Record payments as they come in for targeted reminders.

week4_profile.body: Encourage each member to link their account in My account.

minute.definition: Official record of a meeting, archived and sometimes authenticated with a QR code.

live_mode.definition: Real-time notes and attendance during the meeting.

finalize.definition: Lock the minutes and generate the official unalterable PDF.

dues.definition: Annual financial contribution of each member to the club.

mandate.definition: Term of the club board (typically one Rotary year).

statutory.definition: Regular club meeting with official agenda and required minutes.

descriptions.MEMBERS: Add at least one club member.

verify.hashDescription: SHA-256 fingerprint computed from minute content (title, agenda, attendance). Any modification invalidates this hash.

gdpr.title: Personal data
gdpr.auditDescription: Export your club's action history as CSV (last 5000 entries).
gdpr.loginRequired: Sign in to manage your data.
gdpr.description: Under GDPR, you can export your data or request account deletion.
gdpr.exportDescription: Download a copy of your personal data as JSON.
gdpr.deleteDescription: Request account deletion. An administrator will process your request within 30 days.
gdpr.deleteSuccess: Request recorded. You will be contacted by email.

cookies.title: We respect your privacy
cookies.description: We use strictly necessary cookies for the service to work and, with your consent, Google Analytics to measure traffic and improve the product. See our

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Visa Guard USA, LLC, operator of Rotary Minutes (also known as Club Minutes), is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body:
Visa Guard USA, LLC
169 Madison Ave STE 15839
New York, NY 10016, US
Email: privacy@rotaryminutes.app

data.title: Data collected
data.body:
We collect: identity (name, email), club data (members, meetings, minutes), audit logs and consent preferences.

With your consent, we also collect anonymized browsing data via Google Analytics (pages visited, device type, country).

purpose.title: Purposes
purpose.body:
SaaS service delivery, minute authentication, billing, customer support and product improvement.

Audience data is used solely to understand site usage and improve the user experience.

cookies.title: Cookies and audience measurement
cookies.body:
Strictly necessary cookies: authentication session, language preferences and cookie consent. They do not require your consent.

Optional cookies: Google Analytics (audience measurement). They are only set after your explicit consent via the cookie banner. You can withdraw consent at any time via "Manage cookies" at the bottom of the page.

Google Analytics may process data in the United States. We use Google Consent Mode v2 and only enable measurement after your consent.

Consent choice retention: 12 months.

retention.title: Retention
retention.body: Data is retained for the subscription period and up to 3 years after termination, unless legally required otherwise.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Access, rectification, erasure, portability, restriction and objection. Exercise your rights from Settings or email privacy@rotaryminutes.app.

security.title: Security
security.body: TLS encryption, per-club multi-tenant isolation, SHA-256 hashing of finalized minutes and full audit trail.

contact.title: DPO contact
contact.body: Questions: privacy@rotaryminutes.app. Complaints may be filed with your local supervisory authority.

landing.subtitle: Members, meetings, communications and authenticated minutes — one platform so secretaries save hours and every member gets the PV quickly.
landing.trialLine: 14-day free trial · No credit card · Set up in 2 minutes

caseStudies.title: Clubs already on board
caseStudies.subtitle: See how secretaries and presidents save hours every month.

highlights.onTime: Minutes sent in a few clicks

solution.badge: The whole club, not just minutes
solution.title: A complete club management solution
solution.subtitle: Rotary Minutes connects club life — from meeting to official minutes — so presidents, secretaries and members stay aligned without scattered tools.
solution.outcome: Outcome: fewer late minutes, more transparency for members, and a secretary role that breathes again.

members.title: Members & commissions
members.desc: Up-to-date directory, photos, roles, sponsorship and attendance tracking.

meetings.title: Meetings & attendance
meetings.desc: Scheduling, live mode, check-in and participation stats.

minutes.title: Minutes on time
minutes.desc: Guided drafting, approval, authenticated PDF and bulk member delivery.

comms.title: Communications
comms.desc: Branded emails, campaigns and notifications — without leaving the platform.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From meeting to authenticated PDF in three simple steps.

step1.title: Write live
step1.desc: Follow the agenda, capture decisions and assign action items during the meeting.

step2.title: Review together
step2.desc: President and members read, comment and approve before finalization.

step3.title: Share & archive
step3.desc: Export a PDF with QR authentication and keep a versioned history.

finalCta.title: Ready to simplify club life?
finalCta.subtitle: 14-day free trial — members, meetings and minutes in one tool. Your next minutes can go out tonight.

features.title: Everything your club needs
features.subtitle: From day-to-day management to official minute delivery — for secretaries, presidents and districts.
features.membersDesc: Profiles, commissions, birthdays and attendance history
features.meetingsDesc: Agenda, live mode, QR check-in and reminders
features.writeDesc: Decisions and actions captured during the meeting
features.pdfDesc: Logo preserved, QR authentication, email attachment
features.shareDesc: Send to all members, online verification link
features.secureDesc: SHA-256 hash, audit trail, per-club isolation

personas.title: Built for your role
personas.subtitle: Whether you write minutes, lead the club, or oversee a district — Rotary Minutes adapts to you.

secretary.title: Club Secretary
secretary.description: Draft, finalize and share minutes in minutes, not hours.

president.title: Club President
president.description: Stay on top of decisions, actions and club activity at a glance.

governor.title: District Governor
governor.description: Monitor district-wide activity with read-only access to finalized data.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your club. Modules activate automatically with your subscription.

modules.title: Much more than meeting minutes
modules.subtitle: Modular building blocks activated with your subscription — without cluttering the secretary's daily workflow.
modules.note: Every plan includes a solid core. Advanced modules unlock with Active and High level.

finance.title: Club finances
finance.desc: Dues, treasury and treasurer PDF reports.

execution.title: Actions & follow-up
execution.desc: Meeting decisions turned into tracked tasks with reminders.

calendar.title: Unified calendar
calendar.desc: Meetings, deadlines, events and member birthdays.

portal.title: Member portal
portal.desc: Each member views dues, attendance and shared documents.

advanced.title: Governance & district
advanced.desc: Archives, mandates, integrations and district view (High level).

demo.bilingualFeature: Native FR/EN bilingual interface for international clubs.

landing.title: Rotary Minutes — Modern meeting minutes for Rotary clubs
landing.description: Collaborative SaaS for writing, archiving and authenticating Rotary and Rotaract meeting minutes. Live meetings, QR PDFs, dues and treasury.

help.title: Help center — Rotary Minutes
help.description: Guides for minutes, meetings, dues, emails and subscriptions on Rotary Minutes.

help.title: Help center
help.subtitle: Quick answers for secretaries, treasurers and club officers.
help.contactHint: Can't find what you need? Use the contact form on the home page.

getting-started.title: Getting started
getting-started.body:
After registration, complete the onboarding checklist: club profile, members, first meeting, invitations, then your first minutes draft.

The dashboard shows your next steps until setup is complete.

minutes.title: Writing and publishing minutes
minutes.body:
Create a meeting, open the linked minutes draft, fill agenda items during or after the session, then finalize to generate the authenticated PDF with QR verification.

Share the PDF by email or download it from the minutes library.

meetings.title: Meetings & attendance
meetings.body: Schedule statutory or board meetings, use live mode for real-time note-taking, and record attendance from the meeting screen or member check-in.

dues.title: Dues & treasury
dues.body: Track member dues by fiscal year, record payments, and export treasurer reports when the treasury module is enabled on your plan.

emails.title: Club emails
emails.body: Send campaigns to members or groups, use system templates for reminders, and track opens when enabled by your administrator.

district.title: District view
district.body: Enterprise plans include a read-only district dashboard for governors to monitor club activity and access finalized minutes.

subscription.title: Trial & subscription
subscription.body: Your club starts with a free trial. Before it ends, choose a plan under Settings → Subscription. You'll receive reminder emails 7, 3 and 1 days before expiry.

caseStudies.title: Customer stories
caseStudies.subtitle: See how Rotary clubs save time and improve governance with Rotary Minutes.

company.operatedBy: {product} (also known as {alias}) is a product and service of {company}.

disclaimer.text: Rotary Minutes is an independent tool. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Rotary International.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: These terms govern access to and use of the Rotary Minutes platform (also known as Club Minutes), operated by Visa Guard USA, LLC. By creating an account or using the service, you agree to them.

publisher.title: Service provider
publisher.body: Rotary Minutes (also known as Club Minutes) is a product and service of Visa Guard USA, LLC, with its principal place of business at 169 Madison Ave STE 15839, New York, NY 10016, US.

acceptance.title: Acceptance
acceptance.body: Using Rotary Minutes means you accept these terms in full. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

service.title: Service description
service.body: Rotary Minutes is a SaaS club management platform (members, meetings, minutes, communications and optional modules). The service is provided "as is", subject to the features enabled for your club.

disclaimer.title: Independence from Rotary International
disclaimer.body: Rotary Minutes is an independent third-party product. It is not an official Rotary International tool, nor affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Rotary International or its affiliated organizations. Rotary and Rotaract trademarks belong to their respective owners. You remain responsible for complying with your organization's rules and charters.

accounts.title: Accounts and access
accounts.body: You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential and for actions taken from your account. Roles and permissions within the club are set by the club administrator.

data.title: Data and content
data.body: You retain ownership of the data you enter. You grant us a limited license to host, process and display that data to provide the service. See our privacy policy for personal data processing.

billing.title: Subscriptions and modules
billing.body: Plans and pricing are set by the publisher and may change. Included modules activate automatically based on the subscribed plan; a super administrator may disable certain modules per club. Free trials and billing terms are shown at signup.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the extent permitted by law, Rotary Minutes shall not be liable for indirect damages, data loss due to misuse, or decisions made based on information exported from the platform.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms. The last updated date is shown at the top of this page. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Track club projects and their related tasks.
projects.deleteConfirm: Delete this project? Tasks will be unlinked (not deleted).

budget.noEntries: No transactions linked to this project
budget.documentsHint: Attach quotes, proforma invoices, purchase orders, contracts or other budget documents.
